title: senecio ngandae
intro: Senecio ngandae, also known as the Ngandae ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae, and is native to New Guinea. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential candidate for treating infections. The health benefits of Senecio ngandae include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
